root_text.an4.203:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco pāṇātipātī hoti, adinnādāyī hoti, kāmesumicchācārī hoti, musāvādī hoti, pisuṇavāco hoti, pharusavāco hoti, samphappalāpī hoti.
root_text.an4.203:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco attanā ca pāṇātipātī hoti, parañca pāṇātipāte samādapeti;
root_text.an4.203:3.3: attanā ca adinnādāyī hoti, parañca adinnādāne samādapeti;
root_text.an4.203:3.4: attanā ca kāmesumicchācārī hoti, parañca kāmesumicchācāre samādapeti;
root_text.an4.203:3.5: attanā ca musāvādī hoti, parañca musāvāde samādapeti;
root_text.an4.203:3.6: attanā ca pisuṇavāco hoti, parañca pisuṇāya vācāya samādapeti;
root_text.an4.203:3.7: attanā ca pharusavāco hoti, parañca pharusāya vācāya samādapeti;
root_text.an4.203:3.8: attanā ca samphappalāpī hoti, parañca samphappalāpe samādapeti.
root_text.an4.203:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato hoti, musāvādā paṭivirato hoti, pisuṇāya vācāya paṭivirato hoti, pharusāya vācāya paṭivirato, hoti, samphappalāpā paṭivirato hoti.
root_text.an4.203:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco attanā ca pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, parañca pāṇātipātā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.203:5.3: attanā ca adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, parañca adinnādānā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.203:5.4: attanā ca kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato hoti, parañca kāmesumicchācārā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.203:5.5: attanā ca musāvādā paṭivirato hoti, parañca musāvādā veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.203:5.6: attanā ca pisuṇāya vācāya paṭivirato hoti, parañca pisuṇāya vācāya veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.203:5.7: attanā ca pharusāya vācāya paṭivirato hoti, parañca pharusāya vācāya veramaṇiyā samādapeti;
root_text.an4.203:5.8: attanā ca samphappalāpā paṭivirato hoti, parañca samphappalāpā veramaṇiyā samādapeti.

translation_text.an4.203:1.1: “Mendicants, I will teach you an untrue person and an even more untrue person,
translation_text.an4.203:1.2: a true person and a truer person.
translation_text.an4.203:2.1: And what is an untrue person?
translation_text.an4.203:2.2: It’s someone who kills living creatures, steals, commits sexual misconduct, and uses speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical.
translation_text.an4.203:2.3: This is called an untrue person.
translation_text.an4.203:3.1: And what is an even more untrue person?
translation_text.an4.203:3.2: It’s someone who kills living creatures, steals, commits sexual misconduct, and uses speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical. And they encourage others to do these things.
translation_text.an4.203:3.9: This is called an even more untrue person.
translation_text.an4.203:4.1: And what is a true person?
translation_text.an4.203:4.2: It’s someone who doesn’t kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, or use speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical.
translation_text.an4.203:4.3: This is called a true person.
translation_text.an4.203:5.1: And what is an even truer person?
translation_text.an4.203:5.2: It’s someone who doesn’t kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, or use speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical. And they encourage others to refrain from these things.
translation_text.an4.203:5.9: This is called an even truer person.”
